diagrams.title: Induction as Domino Effect
diagrams.description: Shows how mathematical induction works like falling dominoes
elements: All dominoes fall (property true for all n)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how induction propagates truth from base case through all cases

diagrams.title: Weak vs Strong Induction Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of weak and strong induction logic
diagrams.purpose: Understand difference between assuming single case vs all previous cases

diagrams.title: Well-Ordering Principle Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows that any non-empty set of positive integers has a least element
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the fundamental principle that underlies induction

diagrams.title: Induction Proof Structure Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flowchart of mathematical induction proof process
diagrams.purpose: Guide for writing formal induction proofs
